data.name: 辣妹冰與火
data.detailed_description:
特色列表

  • 戰鬥時可以做愛
  • 道具系統
  • 天賦科技樹系統
  • 資源收集系統
  • 多樣的性姿勢和性感服裝
  • 3D性愛場景畫廊
  • 無限隨機關卡


關於此遊戲

在這個雪原裡，您將需要一個一個地通過每個關卡，最後找到一種方法來統治這個海盜女孩雪地遊樂場。

該遊戲是2.5D平台動作冒險遊戲。

遊戲中的所有角色均由次世代3D技術製成。
控制性感美麗的女角色的同時，感受一下這流暢的戰鬥+色情的系統吧！
這個遊戲將格鬥和性愛動畫融合在一起，創造出全新的，令人興奮的遊戲體驗！

您可以與遊戲中的所有敵人發生性關係。這是一場一邊打鬥一邊做愛的體驗。
有多種隨機長相的美女會攻擊你（魔法，急速沖刺撞擊等）以及收集金幣解鎖時裝和性姿勢的系統。

該遊戲具有道具技能和才能係統！您可以通過角色自定義系統來更改​​外貌。
畫廊的性愛場景具有許多功能，包括第一人稱相機切換，自由切換性愛姿勢和裝扮。
隨著遊戲的進行，您可以解鎖更多的性愛姿勢與性感服裝和提升更多不同的屬性！
在這裡，您一定會體驗到全新的北部雪原色情之旅！

data.short_description: 控制一位美麗性感的女角色勇闖無限隨機關卡！不斷與其他朝你衝來的美女打鬥和做愛，然後收集金幣，解鎖越來越多的姿勢和服裝，再到可以自由切換姿勢和裝扮的畫廊享受自己的努力成果吧！
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows xp
  • 處理器: 1.3G Hz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics Card supported dx9
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間

data.name: Ice and Fire of Maiden
data.detailed_description:
Feature List

Can have sex while fighting Prop system Talent Technology Tree System Resource collection system Diverse sexual positions and costumes 3D sex scene Gallery Infinite random level


About the Game

In this snowy field, you will need to pass each level, one by one, and finally find a way to rule this pirate girl snowfield. The game is a 2.5D platform action-adventure game. All characters in the game are made by modern game 3D technology. Feel the smooth battle system as you control a sexy, beautiful character! The fighting and sex animation blend together, creating a new, exciting gaming experience. You can have sex with all the enemies in the game. There are multiple enemy types that will attack you (magic, rush, etc.) as well as a collection system. This Game has props skills and talent systems! And you can change your race by character custom system. H-Scene has many features, include first-person camera toggle. As the game progresses, you can unlock more sex positions and more different combat powers! Here, you will definitely experience a new, northern snowfield porn tour!

Keep fighting and having sex with other beauties rushing towards you, then collect coins, unlock more and more sex positions and sexy costumes, and enjoy the fruits of your hard work in gallery where you can change sex positions and dresses!
